text: /ci4 1 こんなに色々なエネミーが……

/ci1 1 やれやれ、悪食にも程があるぞ。
【双子】よ。
/ci4 1 Look at all these different enemies...

/ci1 1 My oh my. I've heard of poor eating
habits, but this is ridiculous, [Gemini].
こんなに色々なエネミーが……
